reviews.name: places/ChIJ_U7BS7Ex9ocRhxDIdIJqBGM/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ObFkwTmtlWEpITUVKUmVtTXpabTFoUzJ4SWFVRRAB
reviews.text:
My family and I have been members at Concierge Medicine of Minnesota with Dr. Adrianne Westmoreland for one year, and our experience has been outstanding. As self-employed parents of two young children, healthcare used to be our biggest expense. Since joining CMOM, we have received the best care of our lives while saving money.

Dr. Westmoreland, affectionately called “Dr. W” by our kids, is amazing with our entire family. Our children used to have extreme anxiety about doctor visits due to past traumatic experiences, but Dr. W’s calm approach and welcoming office have completely changed that. The clinic is quiet, easy to access, and beautifully maintained. We are greeted by name, wait times are minimal, and the atmosphere is peaceful with snacks, coffee, tea, and plants that make the space feel inviting.

Dr. W’s care is thorough yet never rushed. She reassures our children, helps my husband stay accountable with his health, and has guided me to address issues I used to ignore. Her holistic approach has been transformative for all of us. We have also benefited from remote care while traveling and much more affordable lab work. Blood tests in particular are significantly cheaper through CMOM compared to traditional clinics.

Another major benefit is freedom of choice. Because Dr. W is independent from hospital systems and insurance networks, her recommendations are based on quality, not contracts. We still carry insurance for specialists, but sometimes find it cheaper to pay directly.

Concierge Medicine of Minnesota has empowered our family to take charge of our health. Dr. Westmoreland and her staff are true professionals committed to accessible, top-notch care. I highly recommend CMOM to anyone seeking a better healthcare experience.

I decided to go with a stem cell injection to my left knee as well as a stem cell infusion. I’ve also attended two of four Soft Wave Therapies currently. I have had definite improvement in my left knee. Coincidentally, my decades old Colitis has been in remission. Genovations Regen has been a “Win-Win” treatment plan for me. Jennifer is so skilled, knowledgeable and compassionate in her care. Joselyn is terrific/top notch as well! Thank you SO much, Kathy B.

reviews.name: places/ChIJveuJAdQf9ocRtC50hhjKJT4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWYVNXcDFRa1ptZGkxa1ZHOTNaUzF0U1ZNM1UwRRAB
reviews.text:
I struggled with weight gain after the age of 50. No exercise or diet could help me loose weight no matter how hard I tried. I spoke with my doctor, she had no answers for me. I tried to find solutions online, but they all seemed like a hoax. I attended a women’s retreat and ran into an acquaintance I had not seen for years and she told me about her experience with Be Balanced.
I was intrigued at the thought of balancing my hormones and restarting my body by removing sugars and other toxins.
For me the program was straightforward and easy to follow. Although I struggled to adjust to the change in my food intake and had some tough days, I now possess a clarity of mind, a solid sleeping pattern and have lost (and kept off) 23.2 pounds for four months now!
I am pre-diabetic and have rheumatoid arthritis and I have kept my blood sugars in a healthy range and significantly reduced the inflammation in my body.
The Be Balanced program was an emotional, physical and financial stretch for me. I am so glad I took the risk! The change in my lifestyle, in the way I live my everyday life, is something I will be able to maintain, with ease, for as long as I am able to care for myself. Thank you Be Balanced!

reviews.name: places/ChIJveuJAdQf9ocRtC50hhjKJT4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xVeVprcGxTRW80UVRCclYxQkpSalI1T1hVd2FtYxAB
reviews.text: BeBalanced is truly an amazing program.  My only regret is I didn't start the program 10 years ago when the weight kept adding on from Menopause.   I have always been a healthy eater but could not lose the 25 lbs I gained.  My hormones were out of balance.  The program was easy for me.  I never thought the results were possible.  The energy I gained was amazing.  If you are looking to lose weight and maintain it, this is really the program for you.  It becomes a lifestyle.   Reach out to Andrea at the Minnetonka location and she will get you all set up on your journey to a new you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJveuJAdQf9ocRtC50hhjKJT4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21sNVlURTVaRGR5TlV0Q2NUbFdTVUZYZVhaMGMzYxAB
reviews.text: This program is thoughtfully designed, science-based, and truly individualized.  Andrea Mars takes the time to understand your health history and goals, making the experience feel supportive rather than generic.  I appreciated the clear guidance, ongoing accountability, and focus on sustainable, natural results - not quick fixes.  I highly recommend BeBalanced to anyone looking to improve their health and weight through a balanced, hormone-focused approach.

reviews.name: places/ChIJveuJAdQf9ocRtC50hhjKJT4/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KVk16Qm9UVGhhVVdGdGNraFBaVE5TVlhNelowRRAB
reviews.text: BeBalanced helped me to regain control over my body.   I felt like I was on a runaway train until I got help understanding what I needed to do when and why and how.  I was able to lose 40 pounds. Whew what a relief!

reviews.name: places/ChIJveuJAdQf9ocRtC50hhjKJT4/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwcmJ5Y3lnRRAB

reviews.text:
I started going to Gameday Health about 8–9 months ago for TRT, and I can honestly say it’s been one of the best decisions I’ve ever made for my health.

Like a lot of people, I was nervous at first — unsure about the stereotypes around TRT, unsure what to expect, unsure if it was “right” for me. Those worries disappeared almost immediately. The team at Gameday Health is on a completely different level. The staff is out-of-this-world amazing — warm, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in you as a human being. Every visit feels like connecting with people who actually care.

Andy and Ryan lead the team in a way that you can feel the moment you walk in the door. They truly take care of their staff, and that culture translates directly into a comfortable, easy, supportive environment for clients. You’re never rushed, never judged, and always taken seriously. I actually look forward to seeing this team vs. visiting my primary care.

The results have been life-changing.

Both my partner and I have been able to find the right testosterone levels for our bodies, and the difference has been incredible. Better sleep. More stable energy. Clearer moods. Total changes in body composition. And for me personally — as a 33-year-old who works out regularly — TRT has helped me reconnect with my confidence, my physique, and my overall sense of well-being. I feel healthier and more in tune with my body than I have in years.

If you’re on the fence or feeling unsure, I can relate. But I can also say that taking the leap with Gameday Health has made a massive impact on my life, and I couldn’t be more grateful for the team there.

Highly, highly recommended.

The space itself is absolutely stunning—a beautiful environment that adds to the overall serenity of the visit. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience and am already looking forward to my next appointment. Thank you, Lindsey and team, for creating such a welcoming and empowering space!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2wIU-esg9ocRoYwGJ3iTtc0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRNTlEX3BnRRAB
reviews.text:
While this clinic helped me to learn about how LT hormonal BC had affected me, I have experienced significant side effects from this clinic's prescribed 6-mo treatment, continuing now 5 mos after stopping. The side effects currently include severe adult cystic acne, thrush from treating the acne, gout (I am a young vegan in good shape) that is currently preventing me from standing/walking, depression, & other liver issues (e.g. alcohol intolerance, pain). This does not include the side effects I dealt with during treatment (worst irritability & PMS of my life, irregular periods, multiple allergic reactions). I also underwent a punch biopsy that was unrelated to the reasons for my initial visit & was inconclusive. The doctor was so caught up in tangential findings & issues that I had to remind her that my initial concerns had not been addressed. Despite all these side effects, my initial condition has not improved & has only worsened due to the new health issues. I'm sure that by the time I am healed, I will have invested thousands for nothing because of my visit to this clinic. I give two stars instead of one because of the doctor's bedside manner.

Update: Still can't walk for long at 7 mos.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2wIU-esg9ocRoYwGJ3iTtc0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocFozUWhnRRAB
reviews.text:
The doctor I see is fantastic, but the support staff is really lacking.  When refilling a prescription I have to call in every month to get pre authorization.  You leave messages at the nurses line,  but they never call you back even though they say on their voicemail within a day.  I called the front desk asking to speak to the nurse,  the nurse was “too busy to speak to me and told the front desk she had to punch out at 4”.   I kept talking to the front desk in frustration,  she said the nurse told her it could take them two weeks to get my prescription filled and that’s how it is.  I told the lady that the side effects were terrible when the prescription is empty (btw my prescription is a pump application so therefore you aren’t sure when it’s getting close to empty).
I didn’t swear , but I told her that this is frustrating and puts me into a state of anxiety and feeling down when the prescription is empty .  She didn’t want to listen anymore and disconnected me.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ2wIU-esg9ocRoYwGJ3iTtc0/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMzduTDFRRRAB
reviews.text: The “doctors” rarely have any knowledge of anything to do with infertility and mainly recommend treatments that aren’t necessary. They are ill equipped and not versed on anything with infertility. We went to a different fertility clinic which found the root of the problem as well as achieved pregnancy.  turns out this clinic  was completely wrong in everything they ever said and the tests they had us go through. They wasted 2 years misdiagnosing and having us go through many tests not even knowing the root issues. Do not waste your time and money.

reviews.text: Started out good, had a nice chat with Thomas Joles on my first visit, however never saw him again.  I did like the staff in Plymouth, very nice people.  They seem to prefer sending you home with the medication to do your own injections (which I did not like) and they said "use us for all your medical needs" however they closed the doors and wanted to handle everything via an on line portal.  There was discussions regarding my sleep and other long term effects of the medication which were asked and never went any further.  They talk the talk but do not walk the walk.  Like I said the staff in Plymouth was very nice, they just were not calling the shots.

reviews.name: places/ChIJlQ-6jJPX94cRvjSIcuJk5Ek/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwck9URWVREAE
reviews.text:
I went to get my T checked and they did a thorough evaluation, including a complete metabolic panel. I found areas I didn't know needed attention especially my A1C. These people are really dialed in to health and longevity well beyond testosterone treatment. They could have Rx'd T for me as some less reputable clinics would and have charged me $$$. They did not as my levels were higher than I thought.
I'm going to return on a regular basis to get my panel checked and discuss what else could help me live longer and better.

reviews.text:
Today was my 1st visit.   I was sent by a friend of mine.    I would recommend them as far as my 1st impression.  The front desk gal was nice and had a good sense of humor.  The PA is cool.   I can not review the treatment as of yet due to it being my 1st day and the day of evaluation (blood test/meeting).  Price out of pocket seems fair thus far. reviews.name: places/ChIJlQ-6jJPX94cRvjSIcuJk5Ek/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhcDZQSVdREAE
reviews.text:
STAY AWAY!!! I was mislead from the first appointment about how much this was going to cost me and that the examination would be covered as my annual physical which it was not. All they wanted to do was get me in the program and come in each week for injections. After 3 months I didn't notice any change at all and I found out that it was costing me $119 after insurance for each appt. The labs cost a lot more depending on what they are testing. The first exam cost me over $700 after insurance and the second follow up labs were almost $200.

Every appointment I had with Dan he had no recollection of me and asked me the exact same questions every time. Wrote down the responses but he never remembered any of my responses. He was focused on getting me into the program and getting weekly injections. He first told me that my Testosterone levels were on the border of being low but not to worry he was working on making a case to be able to  treat me. Didn't seem to be actually based on medical decisions but how could he get me into the program. He also tried to get me to sign up for the program which would be $250 a month which turns out to be less then I was paying but not real information for how that worked. Dan is a joke.

The bottom line is this place is a scam and only wants your money and they don't really care about your health at all just getting you injected and cashing in. Total waste of money and lots of it!
